title: triticum repens var. littorale
intro: Triticum repens var. littorale is a variant of the wild wheat grass, also known as sea fennel, characterized by its coastal or littoral habitat and distinctive fennel-like appearance. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Triticum repens var. littorale include its ability to aid digestion, reduce stress, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a natural remedy for a variety of ailments.
